title: AND after ON () of LEFT OUTER JOIN with certain expressions will cause crash
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE table1 (taskid INT NOT NULL, cid INT, PRIMARY KEY (taskid));
CREATE TABLE table2 (taskid INT NOT NULL, cname VARCHAR(255), PRIMARY KEY (taskid));
SELECT * FROM table1 t1 LEFT JOIN table2 t2 ON (t1.taskid = t2.taskid) AND (t1.cid IS NULL OR t1.cid = t2.taskid OR t2.cname = 'test');
key_bug_features: AND after ON in LEFT OUTER JOIN causes crash
